etac: SELECT COMMODITY_NAME, STATUS, ProjectID, TaskOwnerEngrRel, SR_MANAGER_NAME, Pri, FlightTest, Tier, [Bucket Code], ECDChangeCount, OBDueChangeCount, EngrRelECDComment, EngrRelDue, CoordGrp, Customer, TOR, ReqForTIA, Act_Hist_Flag, WeekFriday_ByDueOrClose, Monthly_ByDueOrClose, Monthly_ByDueOrClose_RANK, Major_Model, Model FROM APSys_ETAC_PRODUCTION.dbo.vw_APSys_ActiveAndClosed_Transformed WHERE WeekFriday_ByDueOrClose > '2025-01-01' AND (STATUS like 'On Time' OR STATUS like 'Delinquent' OR STATUS like 'Late')
dccs: SELECT Assigned_To_Group, Assigned_To_SubGroup, Major_Model, Monthly_ByDueOrClose, [M/M_Change_Type],  [M/M_Change_Number], [M/M_Prime_Engineer_Name], [M/M_Form_Review_Due], MM_Determination_Completion_Status, MM_Determination_Routing_Status, Complete_Status, STATUS, Determination_Level FROM APSys_DCCS_PRODUCTION.dbo.vw_MM_Det_CurrentAndHistorical_Transformed WHERE Complete_Status NOT like '%Within Review Due'
csdt: SELECT IPT_NAME, COMMODITY_NAME, SDRL_STATUS, TYPE_OF_SUBMITTAL, THREE_LETTER_CODE, PART_NUMBER, PROGRAMS, DATA_ITEM, DATA_ITEM_DESC, NOMENCLATURE, SUPPLIER_NAME, SUPPLIER_CHANGE_NOTIFICATION_SCN, SDT_STATUS, SDT_Archive_STATUS, [Is_SDT_Compliant?], WeekFriday_ByDueOrClose, Monthly_ByDueOrClose, Status, IsSCN, RESUBMIT_FOR_SDT, RETURN_FOR_CORRECTION, Total_Age_InMDays FROM APSys_CSDT_PRODUCTION.dbo.vw_APSys_ActiveAndClosed_Transformed WHERE Status like 'On Time' OR STATUS like 'Delinquent' OR STATUS like 'Late'
etac_prediction: SELECT COMMODITY_NAME, RelRecNo, ProjectID, TaskOwnerEngrRel, SR_MANAGER_NAME, Pri, FlightTest, Tier, [Bucket Code], ECDChangeCount, OBDueChangeCount, EngrRelECDComment, EngrRelDue, CoordGrp, Customer, TOR, ReqForTIA, WeekFriday_ByDueOrClose, Monthly_ByDueOrClose, Monthly_ByDueOrClose_RANK, Major_Model, Model FROM APSys_ETAC_PRODUCTION.dbo.vw_APSys_ActiveAndClosed_Transformed WHERE [STATUS] like 'Open'
dccs_prediction: SELECT CHANGE_ID, Assigned_To_Group, Assigned_To_SubGroup, Major_Model, Monthly_ByDueOrClose, [M/M_Change_Type],  [M/M_Change_Number], [M/M_Prime_Engineer_Name], [M/M_Form_Review_Due], MM_Determination_Completion_Status, MM_Determination_Routing_Status, Complete_Status, STATUS, Determination_Level FROM APSys_DCCS_PRODUCTION.dbo.vw_MM_Det_CurrentAndHistorical_Transformed WHERE Complete_Status like '%Within Review Due'
csdt_prediction: SELECT DISTINCT IPT_NAME, COMMODITY_NAME, SDT_NUM, SDRL_ID, SDRL_STATUS, TYPE_OF_SUBMITTAL, THREE_LETTER_CODE, PART_NUMBER, PROGRAMS, DATA_ITEM, DATA_ITEM_DESC, NOMENCLATURE, SUPPLIER_NAME, SUPPLIER_CHANGE_NOTIFICATION_SCN, SDT_STATUS, SDT_Archive_STATUS, [Is_SDT_Compliant?], WeekFriday_ByDueOrClose, Monthly_ByDueOrClose, Status, IsSCN, RESUBMIT_FOR_SDT, RETURN_FOR_CORRECTION, Total_Age_InMDays FROM APSys_CSDT_PRODUCTION.dbo.vw_APSys_ActiveAndClosed_Transformed WHERE Status like 'Open'
etac_create_table: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM APSys_UnifiedData_DEV.sys.tables WHERE name = 'ETAC_On_Time_Delivery_PredictionsXG500' AND schema_id = SCHEMA_ID('dbo'))  BEGIN CREATE TABLE APSys_UnifiedData_DEV.dbo.ETAC_On_Time_Delivery_PredictionsXG500 (id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY(1,1), ProjectID NVARCHAR(50), RelRecNo NVARCHAR(50), COMMODITY_NAME NVARCHAR(50), Prediction NVARCHAR(50), PredictionDate DATE); END;
dccs_create_table: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM APSys_UnifiedData_DEV.sys.tables WHERE name = 'MM_On_Time_Delivery_Predictions' AND schema_id = SCHEMA_ID('dbo')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE APSys_UnifiedData_DEV.dbo.MM_On_Time_Delivery_Predictions (id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY(1,1), Assigned_To_Group NVARCHAR(50), Assigned_To_SubGroup NVARCHAR(200), CHANGE_ID NVARCHAR(50), Prediction NVARCHAR(50), PredictionDate DATE); END;
csdt_create_table: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM APSys_UnifiedData_DEV.sys.tables WHERE name = 'CSDT_On_Time_Delivery_Predictions' AND schema_id = SCHEMA_ID('dbo')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE APSys_UnifiedData_DEV.dbo.CSDT_On_Time_Delivery_Predictions (id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY(1,1), IPT_NAME NVARCHAR(50), COMMODITY_NAME NVARCHAR(50),  SDRL_ID NVARCHAR(50), SDT_NUM NVARCHAR(50), Prediction NVARCHAR(50), PredictionDate DATE); END;
etac_insert: INSERT INTO APSys_UnifiedData_DEV.dbo.ETAC_On_Time_Delivery_PredictionsXG500 (ProjectID, RelRecNo, COMMODITY_NAME, Prediction, PredictionDate) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?);
dccs_insert: INSERT INTO APSys_UnifiedData_DEV.dbo.MM_On_Time_Delivery_Predictions (CHANGE_ID, Assigned_To_Group, Assigned_To_SubGroup, Prediction, PredictionDate) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
csdt_insert: INSERT INTO APSys_UnifiedData_DEV.dbo.CSDT_On_Time_Delivery_Predictions (SDT_NUM, SDRL_ID, IPT_NAME, COMMODITY_NAME, Prediction, PredictionDate) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
